Alarms.ino.functionality: sets temperature alarms and checks for alarms, printing triggered alarms to the serial port

Multiple.ino.functionality: reads temperature data from multiple DS18B20 devices, identifies the device model, and prints details including address, resolution, power mode, and temperature in Celsius and Fahrenheit to the serial port

Single.ino.functionality: configures a DS18B20 sensor to set alarms and check for alarm conditions, printing the temperature if an alarm is triggered
